title: Fence Fix
description: Fixes Macaw's Grass Top Fences with Diagonal Fences
body:
Having Issues with Diagonal Fences and Macaws beautiful grass topped fences?
Heres a fix

Simply makes Macaw's Grass Topped Fences work by making them ignore diagonal mod all together.

You won't be able to use them as diagonal fences anymore but they wont look weird anymore either.
Let's keep using the mods together without issues :)
